title: AI-Powered Smart Mushroom Farming Training for Youth
body: BRIDGE-AI Kenya successfully conducted a two-day Smart Mushroom Farming Training at JKUAT Smart Farm. Participants learned how artificial intelligence, IoT sensors, and automated climate control can improve mushroom production. The training included practical demonstrations on remote monitoring, disease detection, humidity regulation, and data-driven farm management. More than 60 young innovators, students, and local farmers attended the event. Participants also received mentorship on agribusiness opportunities and digital agriculture careers.
summary: A two-day practical training introducing youth to AI-enabled mushroom farming, sensor monitoring, and climate control technologies.
author: Dr. Jane Mwangi

title: Smart Irrigation Field Demonstration
body: Farmers participated in a live demonstration showcasing automated irrigation controlled through soil moisture sensors and weather forecasting models. The system reduced water usage by approximately 35% while maintaining crop productivity. Participants interacted with the monitoring dashboard and learned how to configure alerts for remote farm management.
summary: Demonstration of AI-powered irrigation systems for climate-smart farming.
author: Dr. Jane Mwangi

title: Precision Agriculture Field Demonstration
body: Farmers attended a live field demonstration showcasing precision irrigation systems, soil moisture sensors, weather forecasting tools, and AI-powered crop monitoring. Participants interacted with real-time dashboards and learned how smart farming technologies improve productivity while reducing water consumption.
summary: Demonstration of AI-powered irrigation and crop monitoring technologies.
author: BRIDGE-AI Field Operations Team

title: AI-Powered Smart Mushroom Farming Training Workshop
body: BRIDGE-AI Kenya organized a one-day practical workshop at the JKUAT Smart Farm to demonstrate how Artificial Intelligence and Internet of Things technologies can improve mushroom production. Participants learned about smart environmental monitoring, automated humidity and temperature control, AI-assisted disease detection, and cloud-based farm management systems. Live demonstrations allowed attendees to configure sensors, visualize real-time data through dashboards, and understand predictive analytics for optimizing crop yields. The event also featured discussions on digital agriculture entrepreneurship, sustainability, and collaborative research opportunities within the BRIDGE-AI project.
summary: A practical training workshop introducing farmers, students, and researchers to AI-enabled smart mushroom farming using IoT sensors, environmental monitoring, and predictive analytics.
location: JKUAT Smart Farm Zone, Juja, Kenya
author: BRIDGE-AI Kenya Communications Team

gallery_images.caption: Facilitators demonstrate real-time environmental monitoring using smart sensors and digital dashboards, showing how data-driven insights support healthier mushroom cultivation.
Workshop participants engage in hands-on activities and collaborative discussions, gaining practical skills in applying artificial intelligence and digital technologies to modern agriculture.
Participants receive a practical introduction to AI-powered smart mushroom farming, exploring how IoT sensors and automated climate control systems improve productivity and sustainability.
